response.step_by_step_log: The video is a medley. First song: 'Nekkyo' (feat. Mori Calliope, artist FAKE TYPE.). I searched for 'Nekkyo FAKE TYPE. Japanese and English lyrics'. Found them. Second song: 'Sepia' (feat. Mori Calliope, artist TOOBOE/INA-related). Searched for 'Sepia Mori Calliope TOOBOE Japanese and English lyrics'. Found them. The scenes map to these songs. Added lyrics to JSON.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by virtual YouTubers. The first song is 'Nekkyo' performed by Mori Calliope (feat. FAKE TYPE.), and the second is 'Sepia' performed by Mori Calliope (feat. INA/TOOBOE).

scenes.description: Mori Calliope starts singing 'Nekkyo' on a stage with a dramatic red backdrop. On-screen text: '熱狂 feat. Mori Calliope'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hurry (Ah-ah), let's get it started (Ah-ah)
耽溺で結構 (Ah-ah), easy peasy, pow
頭の中でこねくり回す
後のペルソナに繋がる
産まれたてのアイディア
多少ムラがあるが疑うこともなく才ある者が群がる
What about you?
(熱狂) Just a little madness, you can't take the drive outta me
(熱狂) Can't hide, it's a new generation creation
(熱狂) Tearing up the canvas, won't be what you want me to be
(熱狂) Can't fight this, uprising outbreak of passion
人様に誇れずとも自分の背中押せるような夢があればそれでいい
たられば終わるよりも只管にもがく
止まない雨はないと信じ今に様変わる
Words like “Gifted” “Prolific”
You better be specific, you better stay consistent
結果が出なきゃ尚追求できる？
できない事があるなら練習
迷いがあるなら熱中
成功の真逆には失敗、一番の近道は自らの地道
You can do it, サイコ！
時は満ちた
Stars aligning, all the stars are aligning
I'm already on my way
険しき道の先も行け、光が差し込むまで
Must find, all this blind risk of mine
Gotta go with my own way
決意は鮮烈、 striking, mine
熱狂
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hurry, let's get it started
Go ahead, indulge, easy peasy, pow
Kneading thoughts in my head
Connected to the persona later
Freshly born ideas
There's some unevenness, but without doubting, talented people swarm
What about you?
Just a little madness, you can't take the drive outta me
Can't hide, it's a new generation creation
Tearing up the canvas, won't be what you want me to be
Can't fight this, uprising outbreak of passion
Even if I can't be proud of it to others, if I have a dream that pushes my own back, that's enough
Rather than ending with 'what ifs', I'll just struggle
Believing that there's no rain that won't stop, the situation changes now
Words like 'Gifted', 'Prolific'
You better be specific, you better stay consistent
If there's no result, can you still pursue it?
If there's something you can't do, practice
If there's something on your mind, obsess over it
Success is the opposite of failure, the biggest shortcut is a path you walk yourself
You can do it, psyche!
It's about time
Stars aligning, all the stars are aligning
I'm already on my way
Even if the path is steep, keep going until the light breaks through
Must find, all this blind risk of mine
Gotta go with my own way
Decisions are vivid and striking, mine
'Nekkyo' (Outbreak of passion)
